scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.typecheck: npx tsc --noEmit --project apps/web/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit --project apps/api/tsconfig.json
scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply meridian-nexus-db --local --config apps/api/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply meridian-nexus-db --remote --config apps/api/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:seed:local: npx wrangler d1 execute meridian-nexus-db --local --file=apps/api/seed/seed.sql --config apps/api/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:seed:remote: npx wrangler d1 execute meridian-nexus-db --remote --file=apps/api/seed/seed.sql --config apps/api/wrangler.jsonc
